meta.title: Proof Profile - Baara
meta.description: Go, SRE, or Infra engineer in France? Find out where you really stand. 45 min, free, reusable.

hero.title: Find out where you
hero.subtitle: Take a standardized Work Sample for your role. Get your Proof Profile: score, benchmark, strengths — with evidence. Reuse it everywhere.

roles.label: Choose your role
roles.title: 3 evaluations available
roles.subtitle: Each evaluation is calibrated for your role. Realistic scenarios, precise criteria, comparable results.

backendGo.title: Backend Go
backendGo.description: Debugging, API design, production decisions. For developers who write Go daily.

sre.title: SRE / Infrastructure
sre.description: Incident response, observability, scaling. For those who keep production running.

platform.title: Platform Engineering
platform.description: CI/CD, IaC, developer experience. For those who build internal tooling.

benchmark.title: Know where you stand
benchmark.description: Overall score + percentile vs other engineers in the same role in France. Not a subjective opinion — data.

salary.title: Negotiate better
salary.description: A "Top 10%" Proof Profile is a concrete argument in salary discussions. Show what you're worth, with proof.

noRepeat.title: No more repetitive take-homes
noRepeat.description: Do it once, share the link. Recruiters see your level without making you retake a test.

visible.title: Be visible without applying
visible.description: Recruiters looking for Go/SRE/Infra profiles find you directly. You choose whether to respond.

choose.title: Choose your role
choose.description: Backend Go, SRE, or Platform. Each evaluation has its own scenarios and criteria.

workSample.title: Complete the Work Sample
workSample.description: 2-3 sections, 45 min total. Realistic scenarios: debugging, design, incidents. Pausable, no tricks.

proofProfile.title: Get your Proof Profile
proofProfile.description: Overall score, percentile, strengths with cited evidence. Public URL you can share or keep private.

proofProfile.label: Your Proof Profile
proofProfile.title: A proven skills profile
proofProfile.subtitle: Not a CV. Not a LinkedIn badge. A profile based on what you demonstrated, with verifiable evidence.

contains.title: What's publicly visible
contains.item1: Overall score + percentile (Top X% of engineers in same role)

private.title: What stays private
private.item1: Areas for improvement (visible only to you)
private.item3: Potential red flags (visible only to recruiters you accept)

visibility.title: Public or private profile
visibility.description: You choose whether your Proof Profile is visible to recruiters or only to you.

consent.title: Contact by consent
consent.description: A recruiter can only contact you if you accept their request. No spam.

deletion.title: Delete anytime
deletion.description: Your profile, your data, your rules. Delete everything whenever you want.

whatIs.question: What exactly is a Proof Profile?
whatIs.answer: It's a skills profile based on a standardized Work Sample. You take a 45-min evaluation tailored to your role, and you receive a score, percentile, your strengths with evidence, and a badge. It's reusable: you can share the link with any recruiter.

takehome.question: Is this a multi-hour take-home?
takehome.answer: No. 45 min total, pausable. 2-3 sections with realistic scenarios. No project to submit.

retake.question: Can I retake it if I'm not happy with my score?
retake.answer: Yes, after a 90-day cooldown. The new profile replaces the old one, but your history is preserved.

whoSees.question: Who sees my Proof Profile?
whoSees.answer: If you set it to public: recruiters on Baara see an anonymized version (score, role, strengths). They must request access to see your name and contact you. You accept or decline.

free.question: Is it really free?
free.answer: Yes, forever. Baara charges recruiters, not candidates.

noGithub.question: I don't have a public GitHub, is that a problem?
noGithub.answer: No. The Work Sample is self-contained: it evaluates your ability to solve problems, explain decisions, and handle production scenarios. No open source contributions needed.

cta.title: Prove what you can do.
cta.description: 45 minutes. Free. A Proof Profile you keep and reuse. Join Go, SRE, and Infra engineers who have a proven skills profile.
